sections.title: Before starting the natural history quiz

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: G'day there, mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day. Are you alright? You look a little lost.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Well, mate, to tell you the truth, I think I've come a gutser with these displays.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Come a what?

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Gutser and no mistake. Me boss asked me to put together a quiz for the visitors.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: But to be deadset with you, I wasn't paying much attention to me boss over there and I've done a bit of a rush job.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean the natural historian?

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Yep, that's the bloke. Say, mate, you do me a favour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps. What do you need?

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Well, you look like a pretty smart cobber. Could you take a look at the display plaques and give 'em a runthrough?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure thing.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Bonza, mate! I reckon three questions per case should be bang to rights.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Take a gander at each case and I'll look over your shoulder to give some advice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. I'm too busy.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Fair dinkum mate. I'm sure I'll get someone else to help me.

sections.title: After accepting to help with the natural history quiz
Prior to correcting any display cases

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: G'day there, mate. How're the display cases coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't had the chance to take a look yet.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: No worries, mate; just have a go when you can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

sections.title: Upon selecting an incorrect answer at a display case

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Hmm, I don't think that's right, mate. Try again.

sections.title: Upon selecting a correct answer at a display case

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Nice job, mate. That looks about right.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Nice job, mate. That looks about right.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Bonza, mate! I think that's all of them.

sections.title: After correcting the last display case

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Nice job, mate. That looks about right.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Bonza, mate! I think that's all of them.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Well done, mate. You finished all of the displays.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Come over and have a chat with me. I might have something for you.

sections.title: Talking to him after correcting at least one display case

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: G'day there, mate. How're the display cases coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm getting there. I still have a few left to do.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Bonza, mate. You're doing a great job so far.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Righty ho! I'll get back and finish the rest.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Good luck!

sections.title: Talking to him after completing the display cases

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: G'day there, mate. How're the display cases coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All done. I've corrected the mistakes.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Beaut' mate! That's the best news I've had all day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Glad I could help.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Right, I'll have a chat to me boss over there and let him know you've helped me out.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: You know, with all this new information you've absorbed, I reckon you can say you're more experienced in Slaying and Hunting now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: No worries, mate. You take care now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

sections.title: Talking to him after completing the natural history quiz

lines.speaker: Orlando Smith
lines.text: Thanks for all your help, mate. Hope you enjoy the museum!
